blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
